LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER. THE COURT CONFIRMS THAT THE LAST DAY THAT JUDGE NICHOLS CAN RULE ON PLAINTIFFS FRANK CAFFERKEY AND MAUREEN CAFFERKEY'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS DECEMBER 30, 2013. IT IS THE COURT'S UNDERSTANDING THAT THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS SERVED ON OCTOBER 29, 2013, AND PURSUANT TO CCP 660 AND CCP 12A, THE TIME TO RULE ON THIS MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL WILL EXPIRE ON DECEMBER 30, 2013.FURTHER, JUDGE NICHOLS IS UNAVAILABLE TO HEAR THE MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL ON DECEMBER 13, 2013, BUT CAN RULE ON THE MOTION PRIOR TO DECEMBER 30, 2013. JUDGE NICHOLS WILL RULE ON THE MOTION WITHOUT ORAL ARGUMENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Intention To Move For New Trial
Off Calendar Dec-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHELLE AKERMAN, ESQ., 415.421.3400, FOR PLAINTIFF FRANK CAFFERKEY ET AL.
THOMAS LAKRITZ, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER. THE COURT CONFIRMS THAT the last day that Judge Nichols can rule on PLAINTIFFS FRANK CAFFERKEY AND MAUREEN CAFFERKEY'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL is December 30, 2013. It is the Court's understanding that the notice of entry of judgment was served on October 29, 2013, and pursuant to CCP 660 and CCP 12a, the time to rule on this motion for new trial will expire on December 30, 2013.Further, Judge Nichols is unavailable to hear the motion for new trial on December 13, 2013, but can rule on the motion prior to December 30, 2013. Judge Nichols will rule on the motion without oral argument. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332
